top_signals.title: China Bond Bears Eye Niche Swap Trade as Rally Doubts Grow
top_signals.summary: Chinese investors are betting a months-long rally in two-year government bonds has gone too far, turning to arbitrage trades more commonly used in the US and Europe to put that view to work.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
